channel.title: Research on Sh1n Chronicles
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Sh1n Chronicles

item.title: Welcome to Sh1n Chronicles
item.description:
Welcome

This is where the deep dives happen. Research, forensics, threat intelligence, and everything in between.

Each post here explores a topic thoroughly — not quick takes, but actual investigation and learning.

What to expect

  • Forensics deep-dives: DFIR techniques, memory analysis, incident reconstruction
  • Threat Intelligence: Analyzing TTPs, malware campaigns, security trends
  • Detection Engineering: Sigma rules, logging strategies, detection approaches
  • Cryptography research: Challenges, solutions, algorithm breakdowns
  • Security tools & techniques: In-depth reviews and walkthroughs

Stay tuned.
